violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Cardboard box full of Tator Tots are stored on the floor of the freezer.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Portioned bags of chislic were found to be thawing in a 12qt plastic bucket of water without continuous water flow.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -The salad prep cooler under the serving window needs cleaned out. There is build up on the floor of the cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -There is a hole in the mop/utility closet between the bathrooms. This hole shows evidence of prolonged water damage. The system used for filling the mop bucket is dripping.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop for large ice bin in server's station resting on top of ice machine. In need of dusting.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Sanitation was not working properly and testing at 10 ppm for chemical dish washer. Inspector and owner attempted to prime sanitizer.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Server's station wash station does not have paper towels.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable Ceiling in kitchen has foam insulation around ductwork. Exposed studs and insulation above hot-hold units in kitchen. These are not cleanable surfaces.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Kitchen Floors were greasy and in need of a touch-up cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
